title: Fee

feeJurisdiction.description: Indicates the specific jurisdiction for the fee that has been deducted from the seller payout.

feeMemo.description: A description of the fee that was deducted from the seller payout.

feeType.description: The enumeration value returned here indicates the type of fee that was deducted from the seller payout. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

description: This type is used to display fees that are automatically deducted from seller payouts.
